feat.name: Anticipate Ambush
feat.text: You keep watch for any hidden creatures or dangerous sites, moving at half your travel Speed. If you’re Anticipating an Ambush at the start of an encounter, you roll a Perception check for initiative, and all enemies rolling Stealth for initiative take a –2 circumstance penalty to their Stealth checks.

traits.name: Exploration
traits.text: An activity with this trait takes more than a turn to use, and can usually be used only during exploration mode.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.
